rooms.name: Lantern Yard
rooms.description: The rain over Camelot tastes faintly of iron. Squires trade rumors beside a shrine of old river-stone.

under.locked_text: The under-route is hidden. A proper under-market map would reveal it.

quest.start: Quest started: recover the stolen Excalibur fragment before it is sold under the old bridge.
start_variants: The courier says the fragment may be under the market, but the route shifts with whoever last lied about it.
A tavern runner claims Mordred's people want the fragment moved before moonrise.
A shrine candle gutters toward the old bridge whenever Excalibur is named.
quest.incomplete: Merlin's courier taps the shrine. The fragment is still missing. Follow the under-market rumor east, then deeper.
quest.complete: Merlin's courier wraps the Excalibur fragment in river-cloth. The yard goes quiet; even the rain seems to wait.

rooms.name: Old Bridge
rooms.description: A bridge older than the crown leans over black water. Someone has scratched a Greek oath into one stone.

encounter.name: Bridge Debt Collector
encounter.win: You break the collector's nerve and win a rumor about an Excalibur fragment.
encounter.lose: The collector marks your name in a wet ledger. The debt will come back later.

rooms.name: Market Under
rooms.description: Below the respectable stalls, charm-sellers auction debts, curses, and maps that disagree with themselves.

recruitable.name: Oath Spirit
recruitable.success: The Oath Spirit joins your party, bound by a promise neither of you fully understands.
recruitable.failure: The Oath Spirit circles once and refuses. It wants proof, not enthusiasm.

rooms.name: Tavern Backroom
rooms.description: Behind the tavern ledger, a card game has become a faction summit. Nobody admits they serve Camelot.

item.name: Under-Market Map
item.description: a damp map showing a hidden under-route beneath Lantern Yard

rooms.name: River Stairs
rooms.description: Wet stairs descend toward Avalon-black water. Chalk marks show a route used by smugglers and saints.

encounter.name: Mordred's Runner
encounter.win: You cut off the runner's escape and learn the vault passphrase.
encounter.lose: The runner vanishes downriver, leaving only a false coin and a worse rumor.

rooms.name: Smuggler Vault
rooms.description: A cellar of stolen blessings. Greek bronze, Celtic knots, and Arthurian steel hum like they have been arguing for centuries.

item.name: Excalibur Fragment
item.description: a moon-bright shard of Excalibur hidden inside a cracked dice cup
